CustomField.description: Derives the trainer name based on the External Trainer and CSM.
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(External_Trainer__c)), External_Trainer__r.FirstName & IF(NOT(ISBLANK(External_Trainer__r.MiddleName)), " " & External_Trainer__r.MiddleName, "") & " " & External_Trainer__r.LastName, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(CSM__c)), CSM__r.FirstName & IF(NOT(ISBLANK(CSM__r.MiddleName)), " " & CSM__r.MiddleName, "") & " " & CSM__r.LastName, "" ) )
CustomField.label: Effective Training Team Member
